    models/hazmat_permit_model.hpp
    models/hazmat_permit_model.cpp
    models/invoice_line_model.hpp
    models/invoice_line_model.cpp
)

    Qt6::Core
    Qt6::Gui
)

    widgets/safety_zone_list_widget.hpp
    widgets/safety_zone_list_widget.cpp
